originContent: # 呆啵宠物 - 原神版
translatedContent: # DyberPet - Genshin Impact Edition

originContent: > [!IMPORTANT]
translatedContent: > [!IMPORTANT]

originContent: > ## ⚠️ 本仓库已停止维护，请前往新版 DyberPet
translatedContent: > ## ⚠️ This repository is no longer maintained, please switch to the new version DyberPet

originContent: > **原神版呆啵宠物已于多年前合并至新版 [呆啵宠物 DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet) 框架。**
translatedContent: > **The Genshin Impact edition of DyberPet was merged into the new [DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet) framework years ago.**

originContent: > 本仓库不再更新，也不推荐继续使用。
translatedContent: > This repository will no longer be updated and continued use is not recommended.

originContent: > 现在只需携带角色文件夹，即可迁移到新版 DyberPet，并享受更多功能。
translatedContent: > You only need to carry the character folder to migrate to the new DyberPet and enjoy more features.

originContent: > 👉 **请前往新版仓库： [ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet)**
translatedContent: > 👉 **Please visit the new repository: [ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet)**

originContent: [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet.svg)](LICENSE)
translatedContent: [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet.svg)](LICENSE)

originContent: ![DyberPet Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/DyberPet-v0.2.2-green.svg)
translatedContent: ![DyberPet Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/DyberPet-v0.2.2-green.svg)

originContent: 呆啵宠物 (DyberPet) 原神版是基于[呆啵宠物](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet)框架创造的原神桌宠，美术部分由[@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864)完成。
translatedContent: DyberPet (呆啵宠物) Genshin Impact Edition is a Genshin Impact desktop pet created based on the [DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet) framework, with artwork by [@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864).

originContent: 🆕 **重构UI版本**已经在 [DyberPet 主页](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet)上线！新版本包括备份存档、添加角色、更友好的UI，欢迎试用并提供反馈！
translatedContent: 🆕 The **refactored UI version** is now live at the [DyberPet homepage](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet)! The new version includes backup saves, adding characters, and a more user-friendly UI. Feel free to try it and provide feedback!

originContent: 如果你喜欢这个桌宠小程序，请点击右上角的:star:**Star**，这对我们继续开发下去有很大的激励！
translatedContent: If you like this desktop pet app, please click the top right :star:**Star**, which greatly encourages us to continue development!

originContent: 同时，更多的角色、物品、功能将陆续加入，请关注[@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864) 和本仓库以获得最新的更新。
translatedContent: Meanwhile, more characters, items, and features will be added gradually. Please follow [@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864) and this repository for the latest updates.

originContent: 如果在使用过程中遇到任何问题，可以私信我[@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302)或者在[Issues页面](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/issues)提出。
translatedContent: If you encounter any issues while using, you can DM me [@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302) or raise an issue on the [Issues page](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/issues).

originContent: :warning:  ~~近期本人忙于博士毕业和找工作的各种事情，框架暂时无法及时更新，十分抱歉。预计将于10月中旬恢复修复和稳定更新。~~:beers:
translatedContent: :warning:  ~~Recently I have been busy with PhD graduation and job hunting, so the framework cannot be updated promptly, apologies. Updates and fixes are expected to resume around mid-October.~~ :beers:

originContent: 正在进行一轮新的UI重构，同时在增加便捷的操作功能，过于繁忙可能更新缓慢，见谅！
translatedContent: A new round of UI refactoring is underway, along with adding convenient operation functions. Updates may be slow due to busy schedule, please understand!

originContent: For **English and more language** version of the App, please see our [Alpha version of DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet/releases/tag/v0.3.0a).
translatedContent: For the **English and other language** versions of the app, please see our [Alpha version of DyberPet](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet/releases/tag/v0.3.0a).

originContent: Please :star:**Star** to get the update later!
translatedContent: Please :star:**Star** to get updates later!

originContent: ## 快速体验
translatedContent: ## Quick Start

originContent: ### Windows 用户
translatedContent: ### Windows Users

originContent: **初次使用**：将仓库[下载](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/archive/refs/heads/main.zip)至本地，解压后双击 **``呆啵宠物-原神.exe``** 即可
translatedContent: **First time use**: Download the repository [here](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/archive/refs/heads/main.zip) locally, unzip and double-click **``DyberPet-Genshin.exe``** to run

originContent: （.exe程序不能离开文件夹，但可以创建桌面快捷方式）
translatedContent: (The .exe program cannot leave the folder but you can create a desktop shortcut)

originContent: **版本更新**：如果你已经在使用呆啵桌宠，将[下载](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/archive/refs/heads/main.zip)的最新文件覆盖已有的旧版
translatedContent: **Version update**: If you are already using DyberPet desktop pet, overwrite the old version with the latest files downloaded [here](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/archive/refs/heads/main.zip)

originContent: (全部覆盖，``data``文件夹会保留，数据不会丢失)
translatedContent: (Overwrite all, the ``data`` folder will be preserved, data will not be lost)

originContent: **百度网盘**：[链接](https://pan.baidu.com/s/1dLY0ZfFcTRySuU4tXv1-pA?pwd=bs1d) | 提取码：bs1d
translatedContent: **Baidu Netdisk**: [Link](https://pan.baidu.com/s/1dLY0ZfFcTRySuU4tXv1-pA?pwd=bs1d) | Extraction code: bs1d

originContent: **夸克网盘**：[链接](https://pan.quark.cn/s/a070df462217) | 提取码：7RD4
translatedContent: **Quark Netdisk**: [Link](https://pan.quark.cn/s/a070df462217) | Extraction code: 7RD4

originContent: ### Linux / MacOS 用户
translatedContent: ### Linux / MacOS Users

originContent: **Mac测试版**
translatedContent: **Mac Beta**

originContent: **夸克网盘**：[链接](https://pan.quark.cn/s/6386f4b5efc9) | 提取码：D3VR
translatedContent: **Quark Netdisk**: [Link](https://pan.quark.cn/s/6386f4b5efc9) | Extraction code: D3VR

originContent: 欢迎加群反馈bug和疑问，获得最新更新！``233305772``
translatedContent: Feel free to join the group to report bugs and questions, and get the latest updates! ``233305772``

originContent: **Q: 程序已损坏，打不开**:
translatedContent: **Q: The program is corrupted and won't open**:

originContent: **A:** 这是第三方应用程序权限的问题，并不是真的损坏了。解决办法请参考：https://macoshome.com/course/1699.html
translatedContent: **A:** This is an issue with third-party app permissions, not actual corruption. Please refer to the solution here: https://macoshome.com/course/1699.html

originContent: 也可以通过[这个评论](https://www.bilibili.com/read/cv21890026)的方法实现 (感谢b站用户 [@洛天依_Linux](https://space.bilibili.com/495653264))
translatedContent: You can also achieve this via [this comment](https://www.bilibili.com/read/cv21890026) (Thanks to Bilibili user [@洛天依_Linux](https://space.bilibili.com/495653264))

originContent: ## 用户手册
translatedContent: ## User Manual

originContent: 请参考这个[简易用户手册](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/main/用户手册.pdf)，或者观看[B站视频](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1fd4y1W7ht)，体验现有功能。
translatedContent: Please refer to this [Simple User Manual](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet_GenshinImpact/main/用户手册.pdf), or watch the [Bilibili video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1fd4y1W7ht) to experience the current features.

originContent: ## 更新日志
translatedContent: ## Changelog

originContent: <details>
translatedContent: <details>

originContent: <summary>版本更新列表</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>Version Update List</summary>

originContent: - 常驻动作数据结构修改，bug修复
translatedContent: - Modified persistent action data structure, bug fixes

originContent: - 同伴添加了常驻动作判定，需要在是主宠物时进行设定
translatedContent: - Added persistent action determination for companions, settings needed when it is the main pet

originContent: - 新增角色：魈
translatedContent: - New character: Xiao

originContent: - 添加了跟随鼠标的功能
translatedContent: - Added mouse-following feature

originContent: - 右键菜单中增加了常驻动作选项，可以改变闲置时的默认动作，选中后将不在随机播放其他动作
translatedContent: - Added persistent action option in right-click menu, which changes the default idle action; when selected, other actions will not play randomly

originContent: - 背包分成了食物和收藏品两栏
translatedContent: - Inventory split into food and collectibles sections

originContent: - 优化了缩放机制
translatedContent: - Optimized scaling mechanism

originContent: - 物品数量为1时不显示数字
translatedContent: - Item count does not display number when quantity is 1

originContent: - 优化了主宠物列表判断和默认宠物的保存方式
translatedContent: - Optimized the main pet list judgment and the saving method of the default pet

originContent: - 加入了好感度等级奖励补偿
translatedContent: - Added favorability level reward compensation

originContent: - 流浪者和纳西妲分别增加了4组对话，将在好感度2、3、4、5级获得
translatedContent: - Added 4 sets of dialogues each for Wanderer and Nahida, available at favorability levels 2, 3, 4, and 5

originContent: - 缩小了纳西妲的体型
translatedContent: - Reduced Nahida's model size

originContent: - 修复了切换角色时陪伴时间打开关闭的bug
translatedContent: - Fixed bug where companion time toggled on/off when switching characters

originContent: - 新增角色 - 流浪者
translatedContent: - Added new character - Wanderer

originContent: - 好感度等级上限调整为8 （卷起来 doge）
translatedContent: - Increased favorability level cap to 8 (rolled up doge)

originContent: - 设置中添加了启动默认角色的选择
translatedContent: - Added option to select default character at startup in settings

originContent: - 设置中可以静音了
translatedContent: - Mute option added in settings

originContent: - 添加了统计陪伴天数及显示铭牌的功能
translatedContent: - Added function to count companion days and display nameplates

originContent: - 对话框自动添加上一步按钮（暂未实装素材）
translatedContent: - Dialog box automatically adds a back button (assets not yet implemented)

originContent: - 调整了对特殊中文字符的长度计算
translatedContent: - Adjusted length calculation for special Chinese characters

originContent: - 增加了附属宠物和主宠物的连接
translatedContent: - Added connection between affiliated pets and main pets

originContent: - 保证收藏品在随机掉落中不重复出现
translatedContent: - Ensured collectibles do not appear repeatedly in random drops

originContent: - 整理了可变更的系统数值
translatedContent: - Organized changeable system values

originContent: - 修复了使用右键菜单收回派蒙时，背包按钮显示的错误
translatedContent: - Fixed error in backpack button display when recalling Paimon via right-click menu

originContent: - 添加了对话界面和功能（暂未实装素材）
translatedContent: - Added dialogue interface and functions (assets not yet implemented)

originContent: - 物品增加属性：``pet_limit`` 将物品设定为只在某个宠物内出现的物品（为即将到来的多个角色做准备）
translatedContent: - Added item attribute: ``pet_limit`` to designate items that appear only within certain pets (preparing for multiple upcoming characters)

originContent: - 收藏品背包格置顶，背景色为淡蓝色
translatedContent: - Collectible backpack slots pinned to top, background color set to light blue

originContent: - 收藏品的使用可以在背包中收回 （如派蒙因bug走丢，可以在背包界面收回）
translatedContent: - Collectibles can be recalled in the backpack (e.g., if Paimon is lost due to bug, can be recalled in backpack interface)

originContent: - 给通知系统语音添加了优先级``sound_priority``属性
translatedContent: - Added ``sound_priority`` attribute to notification system voice

originContent: - 增加了点击时的随机语音事件
translatedContent: - Added random voice events on click

originContent: - 增加了纳西妲的语音库
translatedContent: - Added Nahida's voice library

originContent: - 修复了同伴动作的锚点问题
translatedContent: - Fixed the anchor point issue of companion actions

originContent: - 全面支持多屏（测试中）
translatedContent: - Fully supports multiple screens (testing)

originContent: - 修复了派蒙在屏幕倍率放大时的大小变化
translatedContent: - Fixed Paimon's size change when screen scaling is enlarged

originContent: - 修复了附件的拖拽闪现
translatedContent: - Fixed flickering when dragging attachments

originContent: - 修复了召唤同伴放大时显示不全的问题
translatedContent: - Fixed incomplete display when summoning companions with scaling

originContent: - 修复了一定条件下缩放宠物派蒙位置问题
translatedContent: - Fixed Paimon's position issue when scaling pets under certain conditions

originContent: - 规避了专注时间0分0秒相关的闪退bug
translatedContent: - Avoided crash bug related to focus time 0 minutes 0 seconds

originContent: - 解决了不能言说的狂爆物品惊天大bug
translatedContent: - Fixed the huge bug of unspeakable frenzy items

originContent: - 停止按钮按下后会立刻失效，避免多次结算
translatedContent: - The stop button becomes immediately invalid after being pressed to avoid multiple settlements

originContent: - 修复了快速点击鼠标微小位移造成闪现的bug
translatedContent: - Fixed flickering bug caused by slight mouse movement during rapid clicks

originContent: - 数值栏字体固定为Times
translatedContent: - Numeric bar font fixed to Times

originContent: - 设置内添加是否置顶的选项
translatedContent: - Added option to pin or not in settings

originContent: - 饱食度下降单位时间变为4分钟
translatedContent: - Satiety decrease unit time changed to 4 minutes

originContent: - 增加了好感度3级4级的升级奖励
translatedContent: - Added level 3 and 4 favorability upgrade rewards

originContent: - 为了简化更新过程，``data``文件夹删除了，首次运行会自动生成。
translatedContent: - To simplify the update process, the ``data`` folder was deleted and will be generated automatically on first run.

originContent: - 重力加速度最小值变为0.01
translatedContent: - Minimum gravity acceleration changed to 0.01

originContent: - 取消屏幕缩放对宠物大小的影响，用户可以在设置中自行调节
translatedContent: - Removed screen scaling effect on pet size; users can adjust it in settings

originContent: - 修复了缩放改变时边界判断的bug
translatedContent: - Fixed boundary judgment bug when scaling changes

originContent: - 改进了启动语音的选择逻辑
translatedContent: - Improved logic for starting voice selection

originContent: - 经过四个月的开发，呆啵宠物-原神版正式上线！
translatedContent: - After four months of development, Daibo Pet - Genshin Impact version officially launched!

originContent: </details>
translatedContent: </details>

originContent: ## 加入我们
translatedContent: ## Join Us

originContent: 如果你也想开发一套新的宠物形象、动作、物品，可以参考目前还未完工的[素材开发文档](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet/blob/main/docs/art_dev.md)，也欢迎B站私信我[@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302)和[@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864)，加入我们一起搞事！
translatedContent: If you also want to develop a new set of pet images, actions, and items, you can refer to the currently unfinished [Asset Development Document](https://github.com/ChaozhongLiu/DyberPet/blob/main/docs/art_dev.md), and you are also welcome to DM me on Bilibili [@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302) and [@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864) to join us in making things happen!

originContent: 如果你想一同开发呆啵宠物框架，欢迎B站私信我[@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302)，一起勇闯屎山！
translatedContent: If you want to develop the DyberPet framework together, feel free to DM me on Bilibili [@哦哟喔嚯](https://space.bilibili.com/39307302), and let's bravely conquer the mountain of shit together!

originContent: ## 版权声明

translatedContent: - Pet asset copyrights belong to miHoYo, please do not use commercially!

originContent: - 宠物素材的拆分和动作设计来自 B站[@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864)。转载、使用时请注明出处
translatedContent: - The splitting and action design of pet assets come from Bilibili [@栎曦_Nuo](https://space.bilibili.com/14004864). Please indicate the source when reposting or using.

originContent: - 呆啵宠物遵循 GPL v3.0 协议，开发、使用时，请注明作者 GitHub@ChaozhongLiu
translatedContent: - DyberPet follows the GPL v3.0 license. When developing or using, please credit the author GitHub@ChaozhongLiu
